snippet.sync_client:
from seed import SeedApi

client = SeedApi()
client.taskrouter_v_1_activity.list_activities(
    workspace_sid="WorkspaceSid",
)
snippet.async_client:
import asyncio

from seed import AsyncSeedApi

client = AsyncSeedApi()


async def main() -> None:
    await client.taskrouter_v_1_activity.list_activities(
        workspace_sid="WorkspaceSid",
    )


asyncio.run(main())
